a1_cloud_safe_floor.hypothesis: cloud_safe denominator floor biases cldprmc cloud optics for cloud_box in (0, 0.01)
a1_cloud_safe_floor.wrf_source_lines: module_ra_rrtmg_sw.F:11030-11033 and 11064-11065 use max(0.01, cldfrac) for in-cloud paths

a2_reftra_blend.hypothesis: JAX double-reftra-then-blend diverges from WRF spcvmc per-g-point reftra semantics
a2_reftra_blend.jax_policy: clear/cloud reftra followed by MCICA-weighted output blend
a2_reftra_blend.residual_note: Remaining ztra/per-gpoint flux residuals are recorded in spcvmc_per_band and are precision/lookup-bin residuals, not the rejected reftra-ordering hypothesis.
a2_reftra_blend.wrf_source_lines: module_ra_rrtmg_sw.F:8651-8670 computes clear/cloud reftra separately, then blends zref/ztra/zrefd/ztrad
